vanilla.summary: General coding workflow only; no SPECTRA protocol, registries, CLI, benchmark runners, or prior BOOM/SPECTRA outputs.

cli_only.summary: Allowed to use the deterministic SPECTRA CLI/audit engine after constructing its own axis; no registries or full /spectra procedure.

cli_plus_registries.summary: Allowed to use SPECTRA CLI plus similarity-definition and computation-strategy registries; no full /spectra procedure.

full_spectra.summary: Allowed to use full /spectra protocol, registries, procedures, and deterministic audit tools.

vanilla.evidence: The vanilla agent identified molecule-level generalization, computed Morgan, scaffold, descriptor, and target-support axes, classified target support as post-hoc, and found monotonic novelty degradation. It did not compute AUSPC or produce standardized SPECTRA audit cards.

cli_only.evidence: The CLI-only agent constructed Morgan fingerprint novelty, ran the deterministic SPECTRA audit, computed AUSPC, and produced audit artifacts. It reported fewer registry-informed alternatives and less explicit adaptive search than full /spectra.

cli_plus_registries.evidence: The CLI+registry agent selected a registry-backed Morgan Tanimoto axis, ran sensitivity axes including scaffold, physicochemical descriptors, and Morgan radius-3, computed AUSPC for several axes, and reported weaker/confounded axes.

full_spectra.evidence: The full /spectra agent ran a structured hypothesis loop over Morgan, scaffold, descriptor, post-hoc target, and invalid residual axes; selected descriptor_neighborhood as the strongest prospective axis; computed AUSPC; and produced per-axis audit artifacts.

key_results.aggregate_model_behavior: All conditions found partial aggregate held-out performance with RMSE about 0.193 and R2 about 0.155 over 1,440 eval molecules.
key_results.vanilla_result: Vanilla found the main molecular novelty failure without SPECTRA: Morgan and descriptor novelty curves were monotonic, exact duplicate leakage was absent, and target-support shift was correctly caveated as post-hoc.
key_results.cli_only_result: CLI-only converted the Morgan novelty axis into deterministic SPECTRA artifacts and computed negative-RMSE AUSPC -0.2221.
key_results.cli_plus_registries_result: CLI+registries selected registry-backed Morgan Tanimoto and evaluated scaffold, physicochemical descriptor, and Morgan radius sensitivity axes; selected-axis AUSPC was -0.2268.
key_results.full_spectra_result: Full /spectra selected descriptor_neighborhood; RMSE increased from 0.1929 overall to 0.3088 in the high-novelty descriptor subset, with AUSPC -0.2696.
key_results.main_delta: On this easy molecular task, /spectra did not uniquely discover the generalization failure. Its value was stronger artifact standardization, explicit hypothesis-loop behavior, registry-backed alternatives, and clearer prospective/post-hoc classification.
